# kaleido_platform_connector_stream_factory (Resource)

Deploys a connector stream factory from a connector service's embedded definitions. Stream factories are referenced by standard streams and by user-managed streams that share the same event source.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) Environment ID
- `name` (String) Stream factory template name (e.g. blockEvents, transactionEvents)
- `service` (String) Connector service ID

### Read-Only

- `config_type` (String) The config type this factory expects on its streams, as reported by the connector.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
